result.summary: Depot exposes one public HTTP API at https://api.depot.dev and the Depot CLI/remote-agent command surface; no MCP or GraphQL surface was confirmed.

depot_org_token.label: Organization API token
depot_org_token.setup: Go to your [Organization Settings](https://depot.dev/orgs/_/settings), open the **API Tokens** section, enter a description, and click **Create token**. Copy the token immediately; it is only shown once. Use it as a `Bearer` token in the `Authorization` header.

depot_user_token.label: User access token
depot_user_token.setup: Go to your [Account settings](https://depot.dev/settings), open **API Tokens**, enter a description, and click **Create token**. Copy the token right away; you won't be able to retrieve it again. `depot login` stores this token locally for CLI use.

depot_project_token.label: Project token
depot_project_token.setup: Open your [Projects page](https://depot.dev/orgs/_/projects), select a project, go to **Settings**, then under **Project Tokens** click **Create token**. Copy it immediately; it is only shown once. This token is project-scoped and is mainly used for CI when OIDC is unavailable.

depot_pull_token.label: Pull token
depot_pull_token.setup: Generate a read-only registry pull token from the CLI with `depot pull-token --project <project-id>`. It is short-lived, scoped to the Depot Registry, and is not managed in the dashboard.
